allow: Bash(sed -i 's/s\\.writer\\.Write\(\\[\\]byte\(fmt\\.Sprintf\("-ERR backend error: %v\\\\r\\\\n", fwdErr\)\)\)/fmt.Fprintf\(s.writer, "-ERR backend error: %v\\\\r\\\\n", fwdErr\)/g' internal/proxy/session.go)

Bash(sed -i 's/s\\.writer\\.Write\(\\[\\]byte\(fmt\\.Sprintf\("-ERR backend error: %v\\\\r\\\\n", err\)\)\)/fmt.Fprintf\(s.writer, "-ERR backend error: %v\\\\r\\\\n", err\)/g' internal/proxy/session.go)
Bash(timeout 3 bash -c 'echo > /dev/tcp/192.168.31.200/6379 && echo "redis OK" || echo "redis FAIL"')
Bash(timeout 3 bash -c 'echo > /dev/tcp/192.168.31.200/6666 && echo "proxy OK" || echo "proxy FAIL"')
